creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
The build fails on amd64 FreeBSD 14.1.  This could be due to my ports tree being slightly out of date, so I'll try again with a rebase on the most recent one:

src/ext-bob.c:9:10: fatal error: 'mbedtls/entropy.h' file not found
    9 | #include <mbedtls/entropy.h>
      |          ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
